minimal.intent: small default footprint for focused Codex project work

standard.intent: recommended balanced profile for most projects

full.intent: complete published catalog including niche and optional layers

selection_policy.minimal: prefer when you want lower noise and fewer optional behaviors
selection_policy.standard: prefer for general product and engineering work
selection_policy.full: prefer when you want the full published skill catalog including growth, SEO, content, and specialist layers
